info.name: VeloCloud API Mock Collection
info.description:
Auto-generated Postman mock collection for VeloCloud — 10 endpoint(s) from RPC payload.
Import into Postman, create a Mock Server, and point NetMRI/NI at the mock URL for integration testing.
